properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A heavenly dove of a perfect nature Tender and a loving filled with peace A lonely lamb that must be led Meek and humble, sacrificial The two of the same gentle nature.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, my heart's desire is to be led By your gentle loving spirit A lamb that gives itself up To the Good and gentle Shepherd.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lead me Lord, I cannot walk alone, Sheare away anything that hinders you, Humble and meek, What you long for to be, I give up my rights to you, So that, that I might become a little lamb for you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The dove can only find rest in a Lamb, That will forsake all it's rights, The lamb obeys, the voice that it loves, And think not of its own desires, Pride and wrath being cast far away.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord forgive my against, Return again dear Lord, Won't you take preeminence of my simple vessel.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I was bought with the price Of your precious blood, I'm surrending my will to you, So that, that I might become a lamb That walks with the heavenly Dove.
